jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Zostel
jsonLd.description:
Zostel invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
